title: evolvulus glabriusculus
intro: Evolvulus glabriusculus is a flowering plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Evolvulus glabriusculus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
